data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Adjusts Slightly
data.description: According to Odaily, data from CloverPool indicates that Bitcoin mining difficulty experienced an adjustment today at 11:47, at block height 927,360. The difficulty decreased by 0.74% to 148.20 T.

data.title: SOL/USDT Experiences 4.02% Decline in 24 Hours
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the SOL/USDT trading pair is currently priced at $130.96, reflecting a 4.02% decrease over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty has been reduced to 148.20 T, a decrease of 0.74%.
data.description: According to CloverPool data, Bitcoin mining difficulty was adjusted at block height 927,360 at 11:47 today, decreasing by 0.74% to 148.20 T.

data.title: Trump praises US stock market for hitting new highs
data.description: US President Trump tweeted that the stock market just hit a record high! When will these fake polls show that I've done a great job on the economy and achieved other successes? (Jinshi)

data.title: The Solana Foundation and Blockworks launch Lightspeed IR, an investor relations platform.
data.description: The Solana Foundation has partnered with Blockworks to launch Lightspeed IR, an institutional-grade investor relations platform. The platform is primarily targeted at liquidity token funds, institutional asset managers, family offices, and Solana ecosystem projects, and is expected to launch in the first quarter of 2026. (Blockworks)

data.title: Silver rose to 5th place in global asset market capitalization rankings, while BTC ranked 9th.
data.description: According to 8MarketCap data, as the price of silver rose to $63.99, its market capitalization also exceeded $3.6 trillion, a 24-hour increase of 4.85%. It has now surpassed tech giant Microsoft (market capitalization of $357.5 million) to become the fifth largest asset in the world by market capitalization, while Bitcoin's current market capitalization is approximately $17,940, ranking ninth among global assets.

data.title: Binance Futures page shows that XAU/USDT perpetual contracts are now available.
data.description: According to its official website, Binance Futures has added perpetual contracts for traditional assets, specifically XAU (spot gold). As previously announced, Binance launched perpetual contracts for traditional assets under the brand name "TradFi Perps." The main difference between TradeFi Perps and USDT-based perpetual contracts lies in the trading hours of the underlying asset.

data.title: Ethereum gas fees fall to lowest level since 2017; Here’s why
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) transaction fees have dropped to their lowest point in eight years, falling to levels last seen in 2017 only days after the Fusaka upgrade went live. Data from CryptoRank shows that daily gas costs have collapsed toward the lower boundary of the historical range, marking one of the sharpest fee declines since Ethereum’s early phase of network growth. ETH transaction fees fall to their lowest level since 2017. Source: CryptoRank The Fusaka upgrade appears to be delivering its intended effect by improving execution efficiency and reducing congestion at the protocol level
source: https://finbold.com/ethereum-gas-fees-fall-to-lowest-level-since-2017-heres-why/

data.title: Over $33 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, including $15.71 million in ETH liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $33.0102 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $25.2648 million in long positions and $7.7454 million in short positions. In addition, $15.71 million in ETH positions were liquidated and $9.53 million in BTC positions were liquidated.

data.title: Spot silver has climbed above $63 per ounce, setting a new record high.
data.description: Spot silver has climbed above $63 per ounce, hitting a new high, up over 2% on the day. New York silver futures surged 4.00% on the day, currently trading at $63.48 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: Mexico Doubles Down on Crypto Distance as Banxico Warns of Rising Risks
data.description:
Mexico’s central bank is reinforcing its cautious stance toward digital assets, emphasizing that cryptocurrencies must remain at arm’s length from the country’s formal financial system. In its December 2025 year-end report, Banxicounderscored growing concerns about volatility, cybersecurity, and the unchecked expansion of stablecoins, issues it believes could introduce systemic vulnerabilities if not tightly controlled.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/mexico-doubles-down-on-crypto-distance-as-banxico-warns-of-rising-risks/

data.title: Prediction markets bet Bitcoin won’t reach $100K before year’s end
data.description:
Bitcoin bull market optimism has suffered since the Oct. 10 crash, as chances of a short-term BTC price rally above $100,000 appeared to be fading.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/prediction-markets-bet-bitcoin-wont-reach-100k-before-year-end?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BNB Surpasses 870 USDT with a Narrowed 2.25% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 11, 2025, 15:25 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 870 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 870.48999 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.25% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bhutan plans to issue TER, a sovereign gold-backed token, on Solana.
data.description: At the Solana Breakpoint 2025 summit, Bhutanese government officials announced the launch of TER, a sovereign gold-backed token, on December 17 (Bhutan's National Day). The token will be pegged 1:1 to the gold reserves of the Bhutanese treasury. The name of the token is said to mean "jewel" in Bhutanese.

data.title: A whale staked 25,000 ETH, worth $79.48 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale staked 25,000 ETH, worth $79.48 million. It is reported that the whale withdrew these ETH from Kraken a month ago, when they were worth $84.81 million.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Lion Group spent $8 million to purchase 88.49 bitcoins.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Lion Group announced it has spent $8 million to purchase 88.49 bitcoins. The company also disclosed that as of December 11, its cryptocurrency holdings included 194,727 HYPE and 10,820 SOL. (Stocktitan)
